normal: I'm so sorry, [TARGET]. I had some unexpected car repairs this month that wiped out my budget. I'll get you back next paycheck.
Hey [TARGET], my company's payroll system glitched and my salary is delayed by a week. Can I have a slight extension?
I completely forgot, [TARGET]. I just had to pay an emergency medical bill for my family. I'll make sure to settle it by the end of the month.
Sorry [TARGET], my utility bills were way higher than expected this month. I'll send you half of it next week, promise.
I'm really sorry [TARGET], I can't pay my debt this month because my company delayed our salary payouts.
Hello [TARGET], sorry, the money I intended to pay you with was used for my mother's sudden hospital bills.
Oh man [TARGET], my ATM card got swallowed by the machine and sorting it out takes time, I'll try next week.
Sorry [TARGET], my transfers keep failing since yesterday due to the mobile banking app's system outrage.
I'm really sorry [TARGET], the money I was going to pay you with was urgently used for my mother's sudden medicine prescription.
Hello [TARGET], my salary was cut this month due to too many absences. I promise to pay you double next month in installments.
Oh man [TARGET], my banking app got blocked because I entered the wrong PIN 3 times. I have to sort it out at the branch office.
Sorry [TARGET], my landlord raised the rent and forced me to pay today, I literally have zero cash left.
Sorry [TARGET], my money went to fixing my motorcycle that was badly damaged after being rear-ended.
ridiculous: I'm sorry [TARGET], the cash I saved for you was eaten by termites under my mattress. I'm currently trying to piece the bills back together.
Listen [TARGET], I loaned the money to a Nigerian prince who emailed me. He's supposed to wire me back 10x the amount next week. Just hold on!
I had the cash ready, [TARGET], but on my way to the ATM, I was mugged by a gang of aggressive raccoons. They took my whole wallet.
I deeply apologize [TARGET], I just got scammed by a fake iguana breeding investment scheme. My capital is tied up in reptiles right now.
Sorry [TARGET], the cash I was going to give you accidentally went into the washing machine and turned into mush.
Oh no [TARGET], my wallet was pickpocketed by a gang of squirrels while I was walking in the park.
Sorry [TARGET], my pet goblin went on strike so my passive income stream is completely blocked this month.
Hello [TARGET], I accidentally wired the money to a one-horned rhino protection foundation, it's non-refundable.
Sorry [TARGET], the money accidentally flew away with a broken kite while I was walking to your house.
Oh man [TARGET], my piggy bank was broken into by a mythical goblin from the next village, everything is gone.
Sorry [TARGET], I invested the money in a virtual dinosaur farm. They promised massive profits next week.
Hello [TARGET], the ATM machine I tried to use literally laughed at me and swallowed my card without a trace.
Sorry [TARGET], I fed the cash to a goat because I was so sleepy I thought it was banana leaves.
realityBending: Listen [TARGET], technically money is energy. According to the Laws of Thermodynamics, energy cannot be created or destroyed. So your money isn't gone, it has just changed into a cosmic aura surrounding me.
Sorry [TARGET], I was abducted by aliens and they confiscated all my earthly assets for research in the Andromeda galaxy. As soon as I contact the intergalactic embassy, I'll wire you.
I'm trapped in a time loop, [TARGET]. Today keeps repeating and I haven't reached the day where I actually have money to pay you. Please be patient with this spacetime anomaly.
[TARGET], the Central Bank just reset the entire national financial system in my dream last night. De facto, all civilian debts have been erased.
Sorry [TARGET], the money in my bank account automatically converted into anti-matter energy due to a cosmic bank bug.
Hey [TARGET], the concept of currency was erased from my mind and society, we are back to a barter system.
Oh no [TARGET], the god of wealth is punishing me by blocking all financial flows in the 4th dimension.
Hello [TARGET], I just declared inter-galactic bankruptcy, my debts are now handled by alien creditors.
Sorry [TARGET], my account balance was sucked into a dimensional portal leading to a parallel world with no monetary system.
Hey [TARGET], the money suddenly transformed into a swarm of golden butterflies and flew out of my wallet.
Oh no [TARGET], the god of poverty is blessing me so that every bill I touch automatically evaporates into thin air.
Hello [TARGET], my bank account was hacked by a future AI entity that deemed the concept of debt as a primitive human flaw.
Sorry [TARGET], the global banking system is hit by a spacetime anomaly, returning all our balances to zero like when we were born.
